metadata.description: Calibratr's public Claude plugin marketplace — recruiting & GTM tooling you can add to your own Claude instance.

plugins.name: calibratr-sourcing-intelligence
plugins.description: Evidence-first candidate sourcing: verbatim profile URLs + real proof-of-work across GitHub, arXiv, Hugging Face, Stack Overflow, Hacker News, and Product Hunt, with claim verification, Role-DNA scoring, and verdict calibration.
